title: WgslPrimitive
description: WGSL primitive types accepted in WgslUniformField declarations. The codegen emits matching WGSL field declarations; the writeUniforms implementation must produce bytes in the layout WGSL expects (see https://www.w3.org/TR/WGSL/#alignment-and-size). Common pitfalls: - `vec2<f32>` aligns to 8 bytes; pad with `f32` or use `vec4<f32>`. - `vec3<f32>` aligns to 16 bytes (so does `vec4<f32>`); avoid `vec3` for tight packing. For now the supported subset covers what the built-in modules need. Add more types here as new modules require them.
